title: Digital Compressor Discharge Temperature Protection Logic
canonical_key_hint: Digital Compressor Discharge Temperature Protection Logic
summary: Below 125°C no action; above 125°C for 10 min reduces capacity to 40%; above 140°C stops compressor, restarts after 3 min.
evidence_quote: 当温度低于 125℃，压缩机不动作，高于 125℃，数码压缩机的能力输出降低到40%， 温度高于140℃，停压缩机，故障消失后系统在 3 分钟之后会重新启动。
